author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Decision: permute will be implemented as a zero-copy stride permutation — share storage via Arc::clone, permute shape and strides arrays. This makes permute O(ndim) instead of O(numel). Works on both CPU and GPU since it's metadata-only. The backward is also zero-copy (inverse permute). Need a general-purpose view constructor that takes arbitrary strides.
